description:
305 - 1750 W 2ND AV

Interior alteration to combine units 305 & 306 into one joined suite at 1750 W 2ND AV on the third floor to provide residential improvements to both dwellings at this existing multiple dwelling building on this site.

Ok for field review per Allyson B. March 30th, 2026.

Scope of work: removing wall to combine two units into one, adding new walls, millwork, electrical, and combining sprinkler and fire alarm system.

Schedule B Struct provided by Tim Stockton, Engineer, 604-228-0518, [email protected]
